name: Chocolate Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar; beat well.
3. Blend in cocoa, scraping sides of the bowl and beaters frequently.
4. Add eggs and vanilla; blend well.
5. Blend in whipping cream.
6. Pour into crust.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes (the center will be soft but will set upon cooling).
8. Cool to room temperature.
9. Cover and chill several hours or overnight.
10. Garnish with cherry pie filling.
11. Serve 6 to 8.
